masks.name: browser-grid-live-library
masks.reason: Static browser mockup and local scanned library have different card order, model thumbnails, filenames, and scan/error states; compare surrounding layout separately.

masks.name: detail-panel-selected-model
masks.reason: Selected model preview and metadata are live-library dependent; compare detail panel chrome/spacing in a dedicated fixture pass.

masks.name: bottom-runtime-status-and-reference-stage
masks.reason: The packaged app has a runtime status strip where the browser mockup capture contains stage background after the mockup window ends.

masks.name: right-window-edge-native-capture
masks.reason: One-pixel native capture edge differs from the browser reference frame.
